title: Migration audit
description: Compare reference/diffaero and reference/newton against diffaero_newton plus docs and tests.
findings: Completed a static parity audit and verified a real quadrotor unified-entry regression via isaaclab-newton test_train_entry.

title: Gap report
description: Summarize completed, partial, missing, and regressed migration areas.
findings: Completed capabilities: APG/APG_sto, PPO/APPO, SHAC, MASHAC, world state-only, pointmass family, core envs. Main gaps: SHA2C, quadrotor runtime regression, obstacle/sensor parity, tooling parity, world breadth.

title: Spec setup
description: Initialize project-tech and project coding standards under .workflow and .ccw/specs.
findings: Initialized .workflow/project-tech.json and seeded coding-conventions, architecture-constraints, and quality-rules specs.

title: Delivery criteria
description: Define explicit final delivery gates for the migration.
findings: Delivery requires registry reachability, runtime_preflight/cpu_smoke/gpu_smoke coverage, unified-entry smoke for claimed capabilities, docs alignment, and tracked pass/fail evidence in docs/progress.md.

title: Docs cleanup
description: Simplify docs to active source-of-truth files plus archive historical snapshots.
findings: Added docs/README.md, archived stale timestamped docs under docs/archive/, and updated development/progress/regression_matrix to reflect current scope and known regression.

title: BD breakdown
description: Create bd issues for the remaining migration work.
findings: Created i8x.17 quadrotor regression, i8x.18 SHA2C, i8x.19 obstacle/sensor parity, i8x.20 world breadth or descoping, i8x.21 delivery gates, and i8x.22 tracker reconciliation.

title: Planning quality gate
description: Check whether the session produced actionable standards, delivery gates, and task decomposition.
findings: Artifacts exist, active docs are simplified, key regression is validated, and remaining work is decomposed into non-duplicate bd issues with acceptance criteria.
